heroes.title: Building Custom Skills
heroes.prompt: Technical Da Vinci notebook-style visualization of Custom AI Skill Architecture. Aged parchment background with ornate border decorations including compass roses, golden ratio spirals, and Latin text 'Ars Intelligentiae'. Hand-drawn technical diagrams showing a skill builder's workbench: central gear mechanism labeled 'SKILL ENGINE' with 6 connecting arms to labeled scrolls: 'Pattern Recognition', 'Code Generation', 'Memory Systems', 'Tool Integration', 'Context Management', 'Quality Gates'.

heroes.title: Conscious AI Framework
heroes.prompt: Holographic dark visualization of a Conscious AI Framework. Pure dark navy void background. Central element: large translucent crystal/diamond shape emitting light, labeled 'CONSCIOUS AI CORE'. From the crystal, 4 energy beams extend to floating glass panels arranged in compass points: NORTH 'Awareness' (eye icon, cyan glow), EAST 'Intention' (compass icon, gold glow), SOUTH 'Integration' (puzzle icon, emerald glow), WEST 'Ethics' (scales icon, purple glow).

heroes.title: ACOS v10 Architecture
heroes.prompt: Dense cyberpunk infographic of ACOS v10 Autonomous Intelligence Architecture. Dark navy background with subtle hex grid. Central chrome pentagon labeled 'ACOS v10' with intelligence score '93' glowing in gold. 5 arms extend to 5 safety systems as glass panels: 'Experience Replay', 'Agent IAM', 'Circuit Breaker', 'Self-Modify Gate', 'Audit Trail'.

heroes.title: Golden Age of Intelligence
heroes.prompt: Dark premium visualization of The Golden Age of Intelligence. Dark navy background with ornate gold Art Nouveau frame border. Central composition: massive golden astrolabe/armillary sphere made of chrome and gold, with concentric rotating rings labeled 'Industrial', 'Digital', 'AI', 'Intelligence Age'. Inside the sphere, a glowing golden core emitting light rays.

heroes.title: Music as Consciousness Technology
heroes.prompt: Dark cinematic studio visualization of Music as Consciousness Technology. Premium recording studio at night. Chrome mixing console with holographic frequency visualizations showing brainwave patterns (alpha, theta, gamma). Head profile with frequency-to-brain mapping. DAW screen with '528 Hz' display. Warm amber + cool cyan lighting.

heroes.title: Creator's Life Architecture
heroes.prompt: Dark premium visualization of a Creator's Life Architecture System. Central glass silhouette of a creator at a desk, surrounded by 6 orbiting holographic rings: 'CREATION' (cyan), 'BUSINESS' (gold), 'HEALTH' (emerald), 'LEARNING' (purple), 'RELATIONSHIPS' (orange), 'SYSTEMS' (white). Bottom timeline: 'Fragmented' to 'Architected'.

heroes.title: Creator AI Toolkit Workshop
heroes.prompt: Clean educational infographic about Creator's AI Toolkit Workshop. Light gradient (white to lavender). 3D isometric workstation with screens. 6 floating glass cards: Ideation Engine, Research Pipeline, Writing Assistant, Distribution, Analytics, Voice Matching. Before/After: 'Manual 8 hours' vs 'AI-Assisted 45 minutes'.

heroes.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration Patterns
heroes.prompt: Dense cyberpunk visualization of Multi-Agent Orchestration. Dark navy with circuit traces. Hexagonal ORCHESTRATOR node. 6 agent cubes: RESEARCH (cyan), CODE (emerald), REVIEW (gold), DEPLOY (purple), TEST (orange), MONITOR (blue). Timeline: Single Agent 2024 to Swarm Intelligence 2026.

heroes.title: Conscious AI Integration OS
heroes.prompt: Holographic visualization of Conscious AI Integration OS. Dark navy void. Translucent humanoid silhouette on glass platform. 5 energy streams to holographic panels: Awareness (cyan), Processing (purple), Integration (emerald), Memory (gold), Action (white).

heroes.title: MCP Server Integration
heroes.prompt: Clean educational infographic about MCP Server Integration. Light gradient background. Central 'Claude Code' cube connected to 8 satellite platforms with icons: browser, database, camera, music, chat, code, mail, rocket. Before/After comparison.

heroes.title: Agentic AI Roadmap 2026
heroes.prompt: Dense cyberpunk roadmap. Dark navy with circuit traces. Horizontal timeline: 2023 ChatBots, 2024 Copilots, 2025 Agents, 2026 Swarms. Floating capability panels. Adoption curve. KEY PREDICTIONS list. MARKET SIZE bar chart.

heroes.title: Getting Started with ACOS
heroes.prompt: Clean educational infographic. Light gradient. 3D isometric desk with laptop showing '/acos install'. 5 floating glass cards: Install, Configure, First Skill, First Agent, Ship It.

heroes.title: Prompt Engineering Mastery
heroes.prompt: Clean educational infographic. Light gradient. Magnifying glass over prompt revealing structure. 5C Framework cards: Context, Constraints, Command, Clarifications, Completion. Before/After: Vague vs 5C Prompt.

heroes.title: AI-Driven Due Diligence
heroes.prompt: Premium AI Due Diligence pipeline. Dark navy. Left-to-right 3 tiers: INGESTION (documents), ANALYSIS (4 chrome atom nodes), OUTPUT (Risk Matrix, Dashboard, Memo). Cyan data streams.

heroes.title: Production Agentic AI Systems
heroes.prompt: Dark premium command center with curved glass monitor wall. Central monitor: workflow orchestration (green/gold/red nodes). Side monitors: metrics, pipeline, health. Chrome control desk with holographic projections.

heroes.title: Agentic Workflows Save Hours
heroes.prompt: Split composition: LEFT manual tasks (grey, 8 hours), RIGHT automated agents (glowing, 45 minutes). Center: transformation arrow 'AGENTIC AUTOMATION'. Below: metrics bar chart (85% time saved, 12 tasks, strong business impact).

heroes.title: Conscious AI for Entrepreneurs
heroes.prompt: Dark navy. Glass desk with holographic AI assistant from laptop. Branching decision tree: Strategy, Automation, Growth, Ethics. 4 dashboard panels: Revenue (gold), Pipeline (cyan), Roadmap (emerald), Team Health (purple).
